description: Request body for creating or updating a task automation.

cron_expression.description: Standard 5-field cron expression (minute hour day month weekday).

enabled.description: Whether the schedule is active; paused when false.

github_integration.description: GitHub integration to run as. Defaults to the team's GitHub integration when omitted.

name.description: Display name (stored as the backing task's title).

prompt.description: The automation prompt (stored as the backing task's description).

repository.description: Target repository in the format organization/repository.

template_id.description: Optional template identifier this automation was created from.

timezone.description: IANA timezone the schedule runs in.
